title: Taste Enhancements Test
description: Review my suggestions below and adjust as needed.

questions.question: Which framework should we use?
questions.context: This is the most important architectural decision. It affects everything downstream.

questions.question: Indent style?
questions.context: Minor formatting preference, easy to change later.

questions.question: State management approach?
questions.context: I lean toward Zustand but the codebase could go either way.

questions.question: Testing framework?
questions.context: Vitest has better DX with Vite projects.

questions.question: A note on tooling
questions.context: The following questions cover optional tooling. None of these are blocking decisions.

questions.question: Important: Database choice is final
questions.context: Once we pick a database, migration is expensive. Consider this carefully.

questions.question: Which linters and formatters?
questions.context: These three work well together and catch different classes of issues.
